name: East Austin
boundaries: IH-35, Lady Bird Lake, Manor Road and Springdale Road
description: Located just 2 miles from downtown Austin, East Austin is an energetic, diverse mix of housing and culture.

name: Central Austin
boundaries: literally located in the middle of everything - downtown, Lady Bird Lake, UT campus
description: Homes located in Central Austin give residents the convenience of the city and the comfort of a smaller community.

name: Downtown Austin
boundaries: Central downtown area with walkable access to work, dining, and entertainment
description: Downtown Austin is by far one of the most sought after residential markets in the region.

name: Southwest Austin
boundaries: Close proximity to downtown but includes areas like Circle C and Oak Hill
description: Ideal location for those looking to live within a close proximity to downtown, but want the affordability and convenience of South Austin.

name: Westlake Hills
boundaries: Close proximity to downtown, Lake Austin - west of central Austin
description: Its close proximity to downtown, Lake Austin and exemplary schools make Westlake Hills one of the most desirable areas in Austin to live.
